jsonLd.title: Snapdeal is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Snapdeal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Snapdeal:
Snapdeal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal!
